summary: Backend-only testing of BUG 3 (goal mapping), BUG 6 (changelog API), and BUG 5 (log creation). All 6 tests passed after correcting test payload field names to match actual Pydantic schemas.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 WorkoutLog entry (TEST_ prefixed) for user_a
context_for_next_testing_agent: BUG 3 fix verified: POST /api/profile/intake with goal='Strongman' returns plan with 'Strongman' in name. GET /api/profile/intake with goal='General Fitness' returns plan with 'General' in name. BUG 6 fix verified: GET /api/coach/change-log returns 200 with {changes: []}. BUG 5 (log sync): POST /api/log and GET /api/log both working correctly. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_bug3_bug6_bug5.py
rca_of_issue: Initial test failures were due to test payload mismatching actual schema. IntakeRequest requires 'experience' (not 'experience_level'), 'name', 'trainingDays' (not 'days_per_week'). WorkoutLogCreate requires individual fields: week, day, sessionType, exercise, sets, weight, reps, rpe, pain, completed.
